title: Linux DNS Tunneling Detected
description: Detects execution of DNS tunneling tools such as iodine, dns2tcp, or dnscat2 used to exfiltrate data or establish covert C2 channels over DNS.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*iodine*' or msg like '*dns2tcp*' or msg like '*dnscat*' or msg like '*dnscrypt-proxy*' or msg like '*dnsmasq --server*')))
